notes: Recognizes continuous Driving across midnight even when whole-minute storage ends the prior row at 11:59 PM or rollover metadata carries the same duty tour.
Ignores display-only carryover placeholders and removes the false new Pre-trip request from both Sign and DOT Check without changing any recorded times.
Keeps the exact Pickup / Loading event as the source of truth for BOL and Going to; existing route/BOL regression checks remain active.
Bumps the PWA and service worker so the installed iPhone app receives the corrected checker bundle.
label: v96.5 Midnight Continuity Production Fix
